description: Compare RPC vendor performance (latency, error rates, throughput, data quality) across methods and networks.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (vendor, category, le) (rate(erpc_upstream_request_duration_seconds_bucket{project=~"${project:regex}", vendor=~"${vendor:regex}", network=~"${network:regex}", category=~"${category:regex}"}[5m])))

100 * sum by (vendor, category) (rate(erpc_upstream_request_errors_total{project=~"${project:regex}", vendor=~"${vendor:regex}", network=~"${network:regex}", category=~"${category:regex}"}[5m])) / clamp_min(sum by (vendor, category) (rate(erpc_upstream_request_total{project=~"${project:regex}", vendor=~"${vendor:regex}", network=~"${network:regex}", category=~"${category:regex}"}[5m])), 1)

panels.title: Missing Data Rate by Vendor & Network
Empty Response Rate by Vendor & Network
Stale Block Head Events by Vendor & Network
Block Head Lag by Vendor & Network (lower = better)
Finalization Lag by Vendor & Network (lower = better)
Skipped Request Rate by Vendor & Network
Wrong Empty Responses by Vendor & Network (other upstreams had data)
Current Routing Score by Vendor & Network

title: eRPC Vendor Benchmark
